DELEGATION: orchestrator acting as fact-checker per Stage-04 spec. All 5 Stage-03 priority flags + supporting stats re-verified via WebSearch against named primary/guideline sources. (1) L. reuteri DSM 17938: VERIFIED CLEAN — manuscript references L. reuteri generically and explicitly teaches the species-vs-strain caveat, asserts NO strain-to-trial mismatch (the exact risk flagged); 2025 meta-analysis PMC11777987 supports eradication+tolerability. (2) S. boulardii: VERIFIED — tolerability/AAD-reduction only (RR ~0.36 diarrhoea), explicitly not an eradication agent, matches PMC11860874, no overclaim. (3) NNT 332: VERIFIED mathematically — RR 0.61 (95% CI 0.47-0.79), NNT 332 per PMC12010618/BMC Gastroenterology 2025; plain-English gloss correct. (4) Clarithromycin 22.2-31.5%: VERIFIED vs ACG 2024 guideline, range preserved. (5) 76%/15.6M: VERIFIED vs Nature Medicine Sep 2025 (s41591-025-03793-6) + IARC pr368, exact match. Supporting (28.7% failure PMC10688878, 27-41% fail-despite-susceptibility PMC11807671, rifabutin PMC6406425, furazolidone PMC8467492, regional resistance labelled, mastic gum, sulforaphane, anxiety) all VERIFIED and correctly hedged. ZERO FIX/REMOVE/SOFTEN required — writing never exceeded locked facts. Output: FACT-CHECK-REPORT.md.

agent_log.result: COMPLETE — APPROVED TO PROCEED TO STAGE 06
agent_log.notes: DELEGATION: orchestrator ran both Stage-05 agents in sequence with full autonomy (no Architect questions). hook-optimizer-agent: scored all 14 openings + 14 closings on the 5-criteria /50 scale against FACTS.md voice anchors and the BLUEPRINT tone bible. Only one position fell below the 35/50 rewrite threshold — Ch.1 (biology) opening (~30/50: weak immediacy + reader-recognition, opened on a historical warm-up about 20th-century medicine before the frightened reader saw herself). Rewritten with a reader-recognition mirror that drops Rachel into her own body ('There is something living in your stomach...') before handing off to the Barry Marshall history, which now reads as payoff rather than preamble. ALL original Ch.1 content preserved verbatim one line down; ZERO facts/statistics added (AGENT-RULES Rule 1 held — hooks compress and reframe only). 13 other openings (incl. the locked first line) + all 14 closings already >=35/50 and voice-consistent (no rhetorical-question closes — NEVER-rule #7 held), left untouched. review-bait-optimizer: re-verified current Amazon review-solicitation guidelines via WebSearch (June 2026) — honest-ask permitted, incentivised/quid-pro-quo/sentiment-nudging prohibited, in-book review link permitted; all four existing CTAs PASS compliance ('if the book earned it' framing exemplary). Identified the top-3 review-trigger moments in the actual text: Type A insight = NNT-332 school-hall reframe (Ch.2, 26/30); Type C transformation = furazolidone 'five prior failures' (Ch.5, 26/30); Type B validation = the 'homecoming' beat (Ch.10, 25/30) — all above the 20 underpowered threshold, so NO mid-chapter content rewrites needed (manuscript was already engineered for review velocity). Back-matter CTA scored 37/40 (strong); strengthened Beat-1 acknowledgment only (named the reader's completed journey before the ask). Removed a premature Introduction review-ask placed at the fear-peak before any value was delivered (violated the spec's ask-after-emotional-arc rule and risked a trust-costing tonal intrusion); replaced with a forbidden-phrase-clean forward-pull and reordered the intro close to land on the launch line. Net Stage-05 manuscript edits: 4 (1 hook rewrite + 3 review-velocity edits), all prose-only, no factual/citation/structural change, voice + no-panic + no-sales compliance held throughout. Outputs: HOOK-OPTIMIZER-REPORT.md, REVIEW-BAIT-REPORT.md. NEXT: Stage 06 production (build EPUB + PDF + DOCX via build-manuscript.sh / Pandoc).
